# CSS Snippet Library

This vault includes a curated set of CSS snippets from
[kmaasrud/awesome-obsidian](https://github.com/kmaasrud/awesome-obsidian).
The snippets stay flat in `.obsidian/snippets/` because that is the location
Obsidian scans for snippet files.

## Using the library

1. Open **Settings**.
2. Go to **Appearance → CSS snippets**.
3. Select **Reload snippets** if needed.
4. Enable any snippets you want to experiment with.

No snippets are enabled by default.

## Categories

### Navigation & layout

| Snippet | Purpose | Upstream attribution |
| ------- | ------- | -------------------- |
| `collapsing-sidebar.css` | Hides collapsed sidebars until hovered | Kmaasrud via Awesome Obsidian |
| `outliner-for-the-outline-and-file-explorer.css` | Adds guide lines in the file explorer and outline views | Shamama, wonton, and konhi via Awesome Obsidian |

### Editor polish

| Snippet | Purpose | Upstream attribution |
| ------- | ------- | -------------------- |
| `autofading-ui.css` | Fades header and status bar controls until hovered | Rumen Dimitrov via Awesome Obsidian |
| `better-bullet-points-in-edit-mode.css` | Improves bullet rendering in edit mode | Piotr and konhi via Awesome Obsidian |

### Visual accents

| Snippet | Purpose | Upstream attribution |
| ------- | ------- | -------------------- |
| `tag-pills.css` | Renders tags as pill badges | uzerper via Awesome Obsidian |
| `image-cards.css` | Gives images rounded corners and shadows | TClark1011 via Awesome Obsidian |

## Licensing and attribution

- The upstream Awesome Obsidian project license is preserved as
  `LICENSE.awesome-obsidian`.
- Individual snippet files retain upstream source comments where provided.
